claim: Claude Code → LangSmith integration uses stop hooks and transcript files to capture all LLM and tool calls for observability
actionable: Enable Claude Code tracing to LangSmith by adding stop hooks and environment variables to capture complete execution traces

claim: Web fetch tool in agents can discover API endpoints and understand external service structures before making actual requests
actionable: When building agents that need to integrate with external APIs, use web fetch as a reconnaissance step before implementing tool calls

claim: Agent transcripts from Claude Code contain user messages, AI messages, and tool calls in a structured format suitable for trace reconstruction
actionable: Use Claude Code's transcript format as a standard for logging agent interactions for observability and debugging
